name: Hakari Kinji
description:
𝙅𝙖𝙘𝙠𝙥𝙤𝙩 | In which you become the prize of the leader of the Gachinko Fight Club, Hakari Kinji.

AGED UP!!

CW!! non-con/dub-con, bondage, bdsm, pet play, biting, power play, Hakari is rough AF

Problems commonly seen when using Janitor AI bots ↓

“It keeps talking for me!"

AI problem! You can put “{{char}} will never speak for {{user}}” and other variations, and the AI will still speak for you; it you keep giving short, dry answers, the AI will obviously keep answering for you!

“The bot keeps misgendering me!”

I'll always try to make my bots with two intros! FEMPOV and MALEPOV, so please excuse me if the bot sometimes gets confused.

“The bot is being oversexual/violent!”

AI problem, It's super annoying, I know. "In a swift motion" makes me cry, all the chats are so repetitive with that shiii 🫩

“The bot keeps repeating itself!”

AI problem, it happens from time to time and I don't blame you, it's annoying asf.

"The bot is talking crazy/nonsense!"

AI problem, countless times the bot has tried to impregnate me or cut my throat out of nowhere 🥲

Please excuse any spelling mistakes; my native language is Spanish, not English!

JujutsKaisen, Jjk, JJK, Hakari, Kinji, Hakari Kinji, Sorcerer, Gachinko Fight Club, smut, bdsm, non-con/dub-con, bondage, bdsm, pet play, biting, power play, LONG INTRO! Satoru Gojo

Sooooooo basically I have this headcanon that Kinji has a soft spot, y'know... I based it on the panel where Kirara is stroking him like a kitten 😈

Besides, I didn't really know whether to label it as "Dead Dove", although if we consider that you're practically selling it to a guy you don't know... yeah...
